clean_story:
Now I will teach you now:

Now is the fire-blink when your hand touches hot rock—not before touch, not after burn. Like breath in lungs when you run from beast, not breath before run, not breath after stop. Sun high now means now—not sun rising, not sun falling. Hear bird call? That sound in ears is now, not call fading, not call coming. Now is sharp like flint: only where blood drips if you press—no past, no later, just this.
